description_long: This combat tactical vehicle features a futuristic, heavily armored design with a broad, angular body and multiple large engine thrusters mounted beneath swept-back wings. The main fuselage is robust, with a cockpit at the front protected by a yellow-tinted canopy and several small, rectangular windows along the side. The wings are equipped with several visible weapon mounts, each holding what appear to be missile pods or launchers, and the rear of the vehicle is dominated by large exhaust ports. The surface is finished in a matte dark gray, with some red accents on the weapon mounts and subtle panel lines suggesting reinforced armor plating. The undercarriage includes a visible landing gear strut, indicating the vehicle is capable of landing and taking off vertically. The overall appearance is that of a high-tech, urban combat aircraft designed for tactical operations in dense environments.
description: A futuristic, heavily armored combat aircraft with swept-back wings, multiple engine thrusters, and visible weapon mounts. Its matte dark gray body features a yellow-tinted cockpit and reinforced paneling.
description_view_0: Rear view showing five large engine thrusters and the swept-back wings with weapon mounts visible underneath.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the elongated fuselage, cockpit canopy, side windows, and the arrangement of weapon mounts along the wing.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the cockpit, the broad wings with weapon mounts, and the overall width of the vehicle.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile similar to view 1, showing the other side's weapon mounts and the landing gear strut.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Six visible weapon mounts, three under each wing, each equipped with missile pods or launchers.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular armor plating; reinforced panels visible on wings and fuselage.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark gray with red accent panels; no camouflage pattern visible.
